creator: mat@FreeBSD.org
text:
As you're asking portmgr for review (for some reason, it's not assigned to the maintainer...)

You should simplify a lot of things.

+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MTEST}
+USES+=	perl5
+.endif
+

-> 

TEST_USES=perl5



+post-build:
+	cd ${WRKSRC} && LD_LIBRARY_PATH="`pwd`/library" programs/test/selftest
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MTEST}
+	cd ${WRKSRC} && ${SETENV} ${MAKE_ENV} LD_LIBRARY_PATH="`pwd`/library" ${GMAKE} ${MAKE_FLAGS} ${MAKEFILE} ${_MAKE_JOBS} ${MAKE_ARGS} check
+.endif


-> 

not clear if programs/test/selftest should be only built if WITH=TEST or not, but what you wrote above translates to:

post-build:
	cd ${WRKSRC} && LD_LIBRARY_PATH="`pwd`/library" programs/test/selftest
post-build-TEST-on:
	cd ${WRKSRC} && ${SETENV} ${MAKE_ENV} LD_LIBRARY_PATH="`pwd`/library" ${GMAKE} ${MAKE_FLAGS} ${MAKEFILE} ${_MAKE_JOBS} ${MAKE_ARGS} check



post-install:
.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
        ${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
.for i in ${DOCFILES}
        ${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/${i} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
.endfor
.endif

-> 

post-install-DOCS-on:
        ${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
.for i in ${DOCFILES}
        ${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/${i} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
.endfor



.if ${ARCH} == "powerpc"
BROKEN=         Does not compile on powerpc
.endif

->

BROKEN_powerpc=Does not compile on powerpc

And there, you don't need to include bsd.port.options.mk any more.
